name: GCP Artifact Registry ImageRef migration cleanup
__comment__: Migrate legacy GAR image relationships from scoped container/platform image nodes to canonical digest-keyed GCPArtifactRegistryImage nodes after ImageRef/Image loading.

statements.__comment__: Remove ontology image labels from scoped ImageRef compatibility nodes. The digest-keyed GCPArtifactRegistryImage node is the ontology Image.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(ref:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef) WHERE ref:Image OR ref:ImageManifestList OR ref:ImageAttestation WITH ref LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE REMOVE ref:Image, ref:ImageManifestList, ref:ImageAttestation RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Migrate HAS_IMAGE edges from legacy GAR ref/platform targets to canonical digest-keyed image targets.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(old) MATCH (src)-[old_rel:HAS_IMAGE]->(old) WHERE (old:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (img:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH src, old_rel, img LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE MERGE (src)-[new_rel:HAS_IMAGE]->(img) SET new_rel += properties(old_rel) DELETE old_rel RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Migrate RESOLVED_IMAGE edges from legacy GAR ref/platform targets to canonical digest-keyed image targets.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(old) MATCH (src)-[old_rel:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(old) WHERE (old:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (img:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH src, old_rel, img LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE MERGE (src)-[new_rel:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(img) SET new_rel += properties(old_rel) DELETE old_rel RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Migrate SCANNED_IMAGE edges from legacy GAR ref/platform targets to canonical digest-keyed image targets.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(old) MATCH (src)-[old_rel:SCANNED_IMAGE]->(old) WHERE (old:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (img:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH src, old_rel, img LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE MERGE (src)-[new_rel:SCANNED_IMAGE]->(img) SET new_rel += properties(old_rel) DELETE old_rel RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Migrate DEPLOYED edges from legacy GAR ref/platform targets to canonical digest-keyed image targets.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(old) MATCH (src)-[old_rel:DEPLOYED]->(old) WHERE (old:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (img:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH src, old_rel, img LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE MERGE (src)-[new_rel:DEPLOYED]->(img) SET new_rel += properties(old_rel) DELETE old_rel RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Migrate AFFECTS edges from legacy GAR ref/platform targets to canonical digest-keyed image targets.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(old) MATCH (src)-[old_rel:AFFECTS]->(old) WHERE (old:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (img:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH src, old_rel, img LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE MERGE (src)-[new_rel:AFFECTS]->(img) SET new_rel += properties(old_rel) DELETE old_rel RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Migrate PACKAGED_FROM edges from legacy GAR ref/platform image nodes to canonical digest-keyed image nodes.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(old) MATCH (old)-[old_rel:PACKAGED_FROM]->(dst) WHERE (old:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage OR old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (img:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH old_rel, img, dst LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE MERGE (img)-[new_rel:PACKAGED_FROM]->(dst) SET new_rel += properties(old_rel) DELETE old_rel RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete legacy scoped manifest edges once the canonical ImageManifestList CONTAINS_IMAGE Image edge exists.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(old_parent:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage)-[old_rel:HAS_MANIFEST|CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(old_child:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) WHERE old_parent.digest IS NOT NULL AND old_child.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old_parent.digest})-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old_child.digest}) WITH old_rel LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE old_rel RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete the current project's legacy platform image resource edges after a canonical digest-keyed replacement exists.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[resource:RESOURCE]->(old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH resource LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE resource RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete legacy platform image nodes after a canonical digest-keyed replacement exists and no project still scopes them.
statements.query: MATCH (old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (:GCPProject)-[:RESOURCE]->(old) MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH old LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE old RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete the current project's legacy scoped container image resource edges after the replacement ImageRef exists.
statements.query: MATCH (:GCPProject {id: $PROJECT_ID})-[resource:RESOURCE]->(old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef {id: old.id})-[:IMAGE]->(:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH resource LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE resource RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete legacy scoped container image nodes after the replacement ImageRef exists and no project still scopes them.
statements.query: MATCH (old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage AND old.digest IS NOT NULL AND NOT (:GCPProject)-[:RESOURCE]->(old) MATCH (:GCPArtifactRegistryImageRef {id: old.id})-[:IMAGE]->(:GCPArtifactRegistryImage {digest: old.digest}) WITH old LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE old RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted
